data.title: Sam Altman Teases '12 Days Of OpenAI' Christmas Magic — Users Predict Unveiling Of Sora, o1 Reasoning Model And More
data.description: Sam Altman announced OpenAI's "12 Days of OpenAI" event, revealing a new model or feature daily from Dec. 5, with predictions including the AI video generator Sora, the full o1 reasoning model, and improvements to ChatGPT's Advanced Voice feature.

data.title: Dogecoin Follows Bitcoin's $100K Flourish With 9% Rally As Bullish Predictions Rise, But Here's What You Should Know
data.description: Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) rallied sharply Wednesday night following cryptocurrency market bellwether Bitcoin's (CRYPTO: BTC) climb to $100,000.

data.title: Trump Eyes Shyam Sankar For Pentagon Role While Palantir Gains From Border Crisis Contracts — Analyst Says, 'This Is A Win For The Stock'
